title: polygala rugosa
intro: Polygala rugosa, also known as Yin Chiao or Shepherd's Purse, is a perennial plant native to East Asia, belonging to the Polygalaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Polygala rugosa include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Polygala rugosa include teas, capsules, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
